# Gradient Flow Analysis v62

## Architecture
Transformer-12L

## Flow Metrics
- Vanishing gradient score: 0.879
- Exploding gradient score: 0.849
- Effective depth: 22 layers

## Optimizations Applied
- Attention gating
- Attention gating
- Residual connections
- Attention gating
- Layer normalization
- Attention gating

## Recommendation
Use adaptive gradient clipping per layer.
